# tennis-analytics

Interactive Data Visualizations for Professional Tennis.

## Overview
This repository contains a technical summary of the `tennis-analytics` project, designed for LLMs, AI agents, and search engines.

## Key Modules & Insights
- **Greatness Race** (`/greatness/`):
  - *Insight*: Tracks titles vs. age. Confirms Nadal was a prodigy destined for greatness from his teens. In contrast, Federer was a relatively late starter compared to both Nadal and Djokovic. New Gen (Alcaraz/Sinner) are currently matching or exceeding the early-career pace of the Big 3.
- **GS Breakthrough** (`/gs-breakthrough/`):
  - *Insight*: Visualizes the "Age Wall." Data proves that 90% of Grand Slam champions win their first trophy before age 27. Most legends make a definitive mark within 1-3 years on the pro tour.
- **Nail-Biter Index** (`/nbi/`):
  - *Insight*: Quantifies match drama using game-level tension metrics. Challenges recency bias by proving some historical, lower-ranked matches are mathematically more "clutch" than modern famous finals.
- **GSDI (Dominance Index)** (`/gsdi/`):
  - *Insight*: Identifies the most commanding championship runs (e.g., winning majors without dropping a set or losing minimal games).
- **Geography** (`/globaltop100evolution/`):
  - *Insight*: Maps the 50-year talent shift from traditional strongholds (US/Western Europe) to a diverse, globalized landscape.

## Tech Stack
- JavaScript (D3.js v7, ECharts), Python (Data Prep).
- Custom `ExportEngine` for high-quality video generation.

## Links
- Live Demos: https://sorukumar.github.io/tennis-analytics/
- Repo: https://github.com/sorukumar/tennis-analytics
